title: Data Types and Records
summary: 9618 AS — INTEGER, REAL, STRING, BOOLEAN, DATE, and RECORD types in pseudocode and exam questions.
learningObjectives: List standard data types and their uses.
Choose appropriate types for given data.
Explain type checking and validation links.

simpleExplanation.title: Types and structured data
simpleExplanation.summary: Data types define what values a variable can hold. Records group related fields under one identifier.
steps: INTEGER whole numbers; REAL decimals; STRING text.
BOOLEAN TRUE/FALSE; DATE for calendar dates.
RECORD Student: ID, Name, DOB — dot notation Student.Name.
Type choice affects memory and validation rules.

sections.content: **Data types and records** (10.1) feed into **arrays** (10.2) and **files** (10.3). Use **Cambridge pseudocode** syntax from the syllabus booklet.
